en-US: For remote rsync, set the IP address, port number, username and password.

en-US: In Remote bioinformatic server area, set the IP address and port number.

en-US: Connection test

en-US: For local mapping, set the uploading path of CAL file.

en-US: In Storage server area, create the customized storage path.

en-US: Tap to save the settings.

zh-CN: 实验室地面需平整，倾斜度小于1/200；实验桌或地面需满足承重要求。
en-US: Ensure that the laboratory floor is level and with a gradient of less than 1/200, and the load-bearing capacity of the laboratory bench or floor meet the requirements.

zh-CN: 本仪器提供自动上传功能，用户负责备份数据到服务器，建议连接测序仪至服务器。
en-US: The device provides an automatic upload function. The user is responsible for backing up the data to the server. It is recommended to connect the device to the server.

zh-CN: 实验室需无尘、无腐蚀性和可燃性气体，无热源及风源。
en-US: Ensure that the laboratory is free of dust, corrosive and flammable gas, and heat and wind sources.

zh-CN: 确保实验室的空间足够容纳相关配套或外围设备。
en-US: Ensure that enough space has been reserved for related peripheral devices.

zh-CN: 建议实验室洁净度满足ISO 14644-1 Class 9。
en-US: It is recommended that the cleanliness of the laboratory meet the standard of ISO 14644-1 Class 9.

zh-CN: 实验室应避免阳光直射，须通风良好。
en-US: Ensure that the laboratory is away from direct sunlight and is well ventilated.

zh-CN: 建议参考二级生物安全实验室标准。
en-US: It is recommended that you refer to the standard of a biosafety level (BSL) 2 laboratory.

zh-CN: 数据备份与灾难恢复
en-US: Data backup and disaster recovery

zh-CN: 确保仪器四周的空间满足仪器散热、线缆使用、开关使用、仪器操作及仪器维护要求。
en-US: Ensure that enough space is provided around the device for ventilation, cable connection, power switch operation, and device operation and maintenance.

zh-CN: 操作步骤如下：
en-US: Perform the following steps:

zh-CN: 基因测序仪采用先进的DNA 纳米球（DNA Nanoball，DNB）以及联合探针锚定聚合（combinatorial probe-anchor synthesis，cPAS）测序核心技术，使用一种经过特殊表面修饰的规则阵列载片，每个修饰位点仅固定一个DNA纳米球，阵列载片修饰位点的间距均一，可保证不同纳米球的光信号不会互相干扰，从而大幅提高信号处理的准确性。
en-US: The device adopts the advanced DNA Nano-ball (DNB) and the core technology of combinatorial probe-anchor synthesis (cPAS) and uses a regular arrayed flow cell with the special decorated surface. Each decorated site of the flow cell contains a single DNB, and the decorated site is evenly arranged on the flow cell, ensuring that the optical signals of different Nano-balls cannot be interrupted by each other. Therefore, the accuracy of signal process is improved.

zh-CN: 用小刷子刷去仪器出风孔上的灰尘，确保仪器可正常散热。
en-US: Remove the dust on the ventilation holes with a small brush. Ensure that the device can ventilate normally.

zh-CN: 如开机后没有运转，请及时联系技术支持进行更换。
en-US: If not, contact the technical support to replace the fan.

zh-CN: 检查散热风扇是否正常运转。
en-US: Check whether the cooling fan operates normally.

zh-CN: 工作原理
en-US: Working principle

zh-CN: 检查并清理散热风扇
en-US: Checking and cleaning the cooling fan

zh-CN: 通过仪器气液系统将DNB以及测序试剂泵入测序载片，载片内的DNB可结合荧光基团，再由激光器激发荧光基团发光，不同荧光基团所发射的光信号被相机采集，经过处理后转换成数字信号，传输到计算机进行处理，可以获取待测样本的碱基序列信息。
en-US: The DNBs and sequencing reagent are pumped into the sequencing flow cell through the device’s liquid system. Each DNB combines with the fluorescence group. The laser excites the fluorescence group to emit light, and the optical signals are acquired by the camera. Then the optical signals are processed and transferred to digital signals, and the digital signals are transmitted to and processed by the computer, so as to acquire the nucleotide sequence of the DNBs.

zh-CN: 该产品采用联合探针锚定聚合测序技术，用于对生物样本的脱氧核糖核酸（DNA）和核糖核酸（RNA）进行测序，以检测基因序列的变化，这些变化可能导致存在疾病或易感性以及各种生物学性状上的改变。
en-US: The device is sequencing instrument that measures optical and electronic signals of the reporting molecules to decode the sequence information of a piece of DNA or RNA fragment through the use of instrument specific reagents and flow cells imaging hardware, and data analysis software. The device is intended for decoding the sequence of DNAs or RNAs prepared into specific sequencing libraries such as DNA nanoball libraries. It can be used for whole genome sequencing and de novo sequencing.

zh-CN: 该产品采用联合探针锚定聚合测序技术，用于对来源于人体样本的的脱氧核糖核酸（DNA）和核糖核酸（RNA）进行测序，以检测基因序列，这些基因序列可用于辅助诊断疾病或疾病易感性。
en-US: The device is an automatic sequencer for NGS applications. It is intended to be used with specific validated reagents and analytical software for decoding the DNAs or RNAs sequence of human clinical sample prepared into specific sequencing libraries such as DNA nano-ball libraries.

zh-CN: 点击>测序方案或Barcode或上传设置，进入测序管理界面，并在此界面进行测序相关的设置。
en-US: Tap >Recipe or Barcode or Uploading setting to enter the Sequencing management interface and set the parameters related to sequencing in this interface.

en-US: Contraindication: None

zh-CN: 各模块功能说明如下：
en-US: The following table describes the function of functional module:

zh-CN: 本仪器控制软件与硬件协同工作，通过约定通信协议和特定物理接口，对仪器的气路、液路、温度、机械和光学等部件进行控制，完成对测序载片中信号的检测，并将图形信息转换为标准格式的测序序列文件，再通过图形化界面引导不同类型的用户完成不同的实验，包括测序任务、仪器状态和维护任务。
en-US:
The system control software initiates the communication protocol through
physical ports to coordinate with the hardware, control gas lines, fluidics
lines, temperature control, mechanical components and optical components. The software detects the signal on the sequencing flow cell, transfers the photographic information to the sequence files in standard format, and guides users to perform various processes, such as maintenance and experimental protocols.

zh-CN: 暗反应指在一个测序循环中只进行生化反应，不进行拍照，所以在下机报告中不会体现暗反应的相关信息。
en-US: A dark reaction cycle refers to a sequencing cycle in which only biochemical reactions are performed, but without imaging acquisition. Therefore, the output FASTQ file will not contain any information on the dark reaction cycle.

zh-CN: 一链、二链、Barcode、DualBarcode以及暗反应所有循环数之和应该不大于测序试剂套装所支持的最大循环数。
en-US: Ensure that the total number of sequencing cycles including [Read1], [Read2], [Barcode], [DualBarcode], and [Dark reaction cycle] is less than the maximum sequencing cycles for a given sequencing reagent set.

zh-CN: 例如PE150测序，一链2~10循环为暗反应，则下机报告中一链总循环数为141。
en-US: For example, for PE150 sequencing, if cycles 2 to 10 of Read1 are dark reaction cycles, the total cycles for Read1 in the output FASTQ file will be 141 (150 minus 9 dark reaction cycles).

zh-CN: 一链和二链的最大读长不可超过试剂套装中的要求。
en-US: The maximum read lengths for [Read1] and [Read2] should not exceed the specification requirements of the sequencing reagent set.

zh-CN: 进行自定义测序前确保自定义标签序列文件已经导入到测序仪中。

zh-CN: 取出维护清洗试剂槽1和维护清洗试剂槽2，将试剂槽及插件中残留的液体倒入实验室指定的废液桶中，用实验室用水清洗试剂槽及插件三次，风干后常温保存，后续可用于清洗。
en-US: Remove the Cleaning Cartridge 1 and Cleaning Cartridge 2, and empty the remaining liquid in the Cartridges and inserts into the designated waste container in the laboratory. Rinse the Cartridges and inserts 3 times with laboratory-grade water, let them air-dry, and store them at room temperature, which can still be used in the subsequent regular or maintenance wash.

en-US: It is recommended that you temporarily store the MDA Enzyme in the -25 ℃ to -15 ℃ storage separately.

zh-CN: 当PCR仪温度达到4℃后立即取出PCR管置于冰上，加入5 μL DNB终止缓冲液（45 μL体系） 或10 μL DNB终止缓冲液（90 μL体系），用无滤芯的阔口吸头缓慢吹打混匀8次。

zh-CN: 生信分析自动化，主要功能：内置常用生信流程和分析工具，允许用户通过图形界面和脚本来构建流程，自动化调度分析任务，全生命周期基因数据管理，全自动化治理和保存数据，提供样本级别、项目级别和流程级别的数据管理，自动化快速交付数据（含校验），可根据数据存储周期配置不同治理规则。
en-US: Automated bioinformatics analysis, with various commonly used bioinformatics processes and analysis tools built in. It allows users to build processes through graphical interfaces and scripts, automatically schedule analysis tasks, manage genetic data throughout the life cycle, and fully automate data governance and storage. It provides data management at the sample level, project level, and process level, and automatically and quickly delivers data (including verification). Different governance rules can be configured according to the data storage cycle.

zh-CN: 主要功能包括：工作看板，样本录入，任务管理，测序管理，实时远程监控仪器状态，消息中心。
en-US: Main functions include: work board, sample entry, task management, sequencing management, real-time remote monitoring of instrument status, and message center.

zh-CN: 本仪器控制软件与硬件协同工作，通过约定通信协议和特定物理接口，对仪器的气路、液路、温度、机械和光学等部件进行控制，完成对测序载片中信号的检测，并将图形信息转换为标准格式的测序序列文件，再通过图形化界面引导不同类型的用户完成不同的实验，包括测序任务、仪器状态和维护任务。
